notes: Solid Pong implementation with trail effect, angle deflection, serve delay, pause/gameover states, and proper win condition at 11 points; minor issue is ball renders as square rather than traditional circle but otherwise clean and complete.
An excellent and highly polished implementation of Pong, missing only delta-time implementation for consistent game speed across different monitor refresh rates.

A solid and mostly complete two-player Pong with proper scoring, states, and collisions, but it lacks AI/single-player support and has some simplistic collision/game-feel limitations that keep it from feeling polished.
